content: Workers retry payment processing after timeout failures with bounded backoff and idempotent checks.
Recommended retry plan: quick retry, then exponential backoff, then dead-letter escalation.
The hub owns queue control, retries, policy decisions and traceability. Workers execute delegated steps only.
Workers return failed status and error details; the hub decides retry and state transition behavior.
Mixed retrieval keeps source_type, source_id and citation fields attached per chunk to prevent hidden blending.
